basic_details.job_title: RPSC 1st Grade Special Teacher Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 121 Posts
basic_details.department: Secondary Education Department (Madhyamik Shiksha Vibhag), Rajasthan
basic_details.job_type: Permanent / Regular Government Service under Madhyamik Shiksha Seva Niyam 2021
basic_details.short_information: RPSC is recruiting 121 Lecturer (Special Education) posts under Secondary Education Department, Rajasthan, last date 30 June 2026.

important_dates.correction_date: Within 10 days after closing date of application

application_fee.details: Application fee (Ekabari Panjeeyan Shulk) is to be paid online and is non-refundable. The Ekabari Panjeeyan Shulk once paid is OTR-based (One Time Registration). Candidates from other states belonging to SC/ST/OBC/EWS must pay General category fee. Important: If a candidate is absent in 02 or more recruitment examinations conducted during 01 April to 31 March, the online application facility will be blocked for future examinations. Re-activation costs Rs. 750/- (first block) and Rs. 1500/- (subsequent blocks). | Note: Online Correction fee after submission: Rs. 500/- (within 10 days of closing date). SC/OBC certificate correction for Divorced/Legally Separated women can be done online within closing date via court order, free of charge.

age_limit.details: Minimum age: 21 years and Maximum age: 40 years as on 01-01-2027. Since the post is being filled under Madhyamik Shiksha Vibhag (Class 1-II) as per prevailing rules effective 12.11.2025, no additional age relaxation of 03 years (under Rule 16(ix) of Rajasthan State and Subordinate Services (Direct Recruitment) Rules) is applicable. Maximum age limit for any candidate (including all relaxations) shall not exceed 52 years (per Rajasthan rules). Age relaxation is non-cumulative — only one of the applicable relaxations (whichever is highest) will apply.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate or equivalent examination recognized by UGC in one of the following subjects: 1. English, 2. Hindi, 3. History, 4. Political Science, 5. Sociology, 6. Music.
qualification.domicile: As per Rajasthan State Government rules. Reservation benefits only for bonafide residents of Rajasthan with valid certificates issued by the Rajasthan Competent Authority.
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the last date of online application i.e. 30-06-2026. Prior/provisional registration with RCI (Rehabilitation Council of India) before the date of examination is mandatory. Applicants must be permanently/provisionally registered with RCI before the date of recruitment examination and must provide their RCI registration number while applying. Candidates should possess the required educational qualification by the closing date of application.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Matrix Level L-12; fixed monthly salary as per Rajasthan State Government Salary Rules (Metro Note)

selection_process: Paper - I General Studies (History of Rajasthan and Indian History; Mental Ability, Statistics, Mathematics; Current Affairs; General Science, Indian Polity, Geography of Rajasthan; Educational Psychology, Educational Management, Educational Scenario in Rajasthan, Right to Free and Compulsory Education Act) Multiple Choice (Objective) 150 marks 1 Hour 30 Minutes
Paper - II Subject Knowledge: Senior Secondary level knowledge in English, Hindi, History, Political Science, Sociology, Music Multiple Choice (Objective) 150 marks 3 Hours

Special Education: Agencies, Policies, Acts and Rules regarding specially abled persons and special education; Pedagogy, Teaching Learning Material, Use of Computers and IT in Teaching Learning; Education for specially abled students with various disabilities Multiple Choice (Objective) 150 marks
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only at https://rpsc.rajasthan.gov.in. Before applying, candidates must first complete One Time Registration (OTR) on the SSO Portal at https://sso.rajasthan.gov.in using a Citizen Apps (G2C) login and access the Recruitment Portal. During OTR, candidates must upload a live/recent photo, provide Aadhaar/Janaadhar details, and fill all personal details (Name, Father's Name, DOB, Gender) accurately as per Aadhaar — these cannot be changed post-OTR without Aadhaar correction. Candidates who have already completed OTR can directly log in with their SSO ID and apply using their OTR Number/Registration Number. Candidates are strongly advised to read the detailed advertisement and Instructions for Applicants available on the RPSC website before filling the online application form.
Documents/Information to be ready before applying online:
Valid SSO ID and password (or credentials for new OTR registration)
Valid Aadhaar Card / Janaadhar Card details
important_instructions: Candidates must be permanently/provisionally registered with RCI before the date of recruitment examination — RCI registration number is mandatory in the online application. OTR (One Time Registration) on SSO Portal is mandatory before applying. Details in OTR (Name, Father's Name, DOB, Gender) must match Aadhaar/Janaadhar and cannot be changed post-OTR without Aadhaar correction. The application once submitted is final. Any correction in the online application can only be made online within 10 days of the closing date by paying Rs. 500/- (correction fee is non-refundable and no further correction will be accepted after this window). Providing false or incorrect information is a punishable offence under BNS Section 217 — candidates may be debarred and face criminal prosecution. Candidates who are absent in 02 or more recruitment examinations conducted by any Commission/Board during 01 April to 31 March will have their online application access blocked. Re-activation requires payment of Rs. 750/- (first block) or Rs. 1500/- (subsequent blocks) via OTR. Ekabari Panjeeyan Shulk (One Time Registration Fee) once paid is non-refundable. Reservation benefits apply only to bonafide Rajasthan State residents with valid certificates issued by the Rajasthan Government Competent Authority. Candidates from other states belonging to SC/ST/OBC must apply under General category. OBC (BC) candidates of Rajasthan must submit an undertaking (as and when required) along with their BC certificate confirming they are not in the Creamy Layer up to the closing date of application. No mobile phones, electronic devices, watches, or jewellery are allowed inside the examination centre. Negative marking applies — 1/3rd mark deducted per wrong answer. If no option is filled in more than 10% of questions, the candidate will be disqualified. OMR Answer Sheet must be filled using Blue Ball Point Pen only — darken only one bubble per question. If not attempting a question, darken circle '5'. PwBD candidates requiring a scribe must submit disability certificate and scribe undertaking/vow-letter to the Centre Superintendent at least 2 days before the exam date (3 days before for those seeking scribe from RPSC). Scribe facility and compensatory time are as per Rajasthan Divyangjan Adhikar Niyam, 2018. Age limit relaxation provisions are non-cumulative — only the highest single relaxation applicable will be given. All notifications, dates, results, and corrigenda will be published only on https://rpsc.rajasthan.gov.in — candidates must visit the website regularly. Success in the examination does not confer right to appointment — appointment is subject to Police Verification, Character Verification, and medical fitness. The Commission's decision in all matters relating to acceptance/rejection of applications, eligibility, and selection is final.
